role_summary: Command-line interface entry point that serves as the primary user-facing interface for initializing project workspaces and triggering automated codebase analysis to generate documentation.
finding: The system implements a clear two-phase workflow: workspace initialization followed by codebase traversal and wiki generation. Core processing is delegated to an orchestrator component, emphasizing a separation of concerns between user interaction and business logic. The tool is explicitly designed to be technology-agnostic, abstracting underlying codebase specifics to produce standardized documentation.
